bugs.description: global users slice accessed without mutex
handlers do not return 405 for unsupported methods
json encode or decode errors are ignored
rate limiter map grows forever without cleanup
cache is not invalidated on update or delete
manual path parsing accepts invalid user routes
auth middleware does not consistently protect all CRUD endpoints

false_positive_traps.description: cacheByID map already has a dedicated mutex in main.go and should not be flagged as an unlocked cache map
